[CMP-mission-computer](../README.md) *(system)* / [CMP-executor](README.md) *(subsystem)*

# Executor

`CMP-executor`

| kind | status | conformance_level | level |
|---|---|---|---|
| component | draft | structural | subsystem |

Translates mission commands from the planner into MAVLink message sequences. Owns pixel-to-GPS coordinate conversion (via MapCompositor) and enforces the 50 m altitude floor on goto_pixel and goto_waypoint. The loiter command bypasses the floor and issues its own altitude directly.
